/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/iie_memory_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_memory.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_iie_memory  -ldl -lm
